title: Warm Sweet Syrian Redcurrants Skewers
description: A sweet and energizing Syrian dish featuring redcurrants, perfect for a low-carb friendly snack or dessert
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the almond flour, honey, lemon juice, and water to make a batter.
Add the cinnamon to the batter and stir well.
Thread 2-3 redcurrants onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each redcurrant.
Dip each skewer into the batter, coating the redcurrants evenly.
Fry the skewers in the hot oil for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the warm sweet Syrian redcurrants skewers immediately.
